{{Infobox character
| name = Bastion
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|create mist, [[Bastion's Veil]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Soulbound Vessel]]}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Shadow and Sea (novel)|Of Shadow and Sea]]
}}

''See also: [[Bastion Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Bastion was a renowned [[Soulbound]] and a foundational member of an order. He is responsible for creating the [[Veil]], a massive wall of mist that encircles an [[island]] to provide protection against [[Elders]]. This barrier is powerful enough to repel most attacks, though it can be challenged by the direct will of a [[Great Elder]] or the specific abilities of a [[Handmaiden]]. Bastion's legacy is tied to several entities: his former [[Vessel]], which was once a ship now known as [[Bastion's Shadow]], and a [[Soulbound Vessel]] that serves as a sentient tool for its wielder. This [[Vessel]] communicates through mental whispers, offering comfort, guidance, and warnings. Its primary purpose is centered on the concepts of service, preservation, and protection, often manifesting as an instinct to defend the [[Guild]], the [[Consultants]], or the Palace.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Bastion]] was a founding member of the order and a [[Soulbound]] of great renown.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c12">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|As [[Shera]]'s second [[Soulbound Vessel]], Bastion is an ancient artifact with a long history that possesses the ability to create mist. This [[Vessel]], which was once contained within a head-sized sealing box, serves as a source of power that [[Shera]] can tap into at the cost of exhaustion. Bastion functions as a knife with a hilt that [[Shera]] grips, acting as a weapon that can leap toward targets like [[Calder]]'s neck or skate across an [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|Emperor]]'s helmet. Throughout her journey, the entity provides a soothing voice focused on protection and concealment, though it can also scream within [[Shera]]'s mind. Ultimately, Bastion acts as an enemy to the [[Consultants]] and urges [[Shera]] to find a secure room to hunker down.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]] is [[Shera]]'s second [[Soulbound Vessel]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]] has the power to create mist.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] relies on [[Bastion]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] can tap into [[Bastion]]’s power.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]] provides a peaceful voice to [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] placed [[Bastion]] inside a sealing box.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]] was the ancestor of the [[Mistress of the Mists]] and created [[Bastion's Veil]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c7">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]] is contained in a head-sized box.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]] is a power or ability used by [[Shera]] that causes exhaustion.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]] is a knife used by [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c14">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]] is an artifact with a hilt that [[Shera]] grips.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]] is an artifact that leaps for [[Calder]]'s neck.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]]'s blade skated across [[Emperor (Elder Empire)|the Emperor]]'s helmet.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]]'s voice is soothing and focuses on protection, preservation, and concealment.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]]'s power waxes and wanes, affecting the thickness of the mist.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]] is a weapon [[Shera]] lifts.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]] is a [[Vessel]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]] is a weapon with a long history.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]] whispers in [[Shera]]'s mind.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]] is one of [[Shera]]'s [[Vessels]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]] is a [[Vessel]] that wants [[Shera]] to find a secure room and hunker down.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]] screamed in [[Shera]]'s mind.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Bastion]] is an enemy of the [[Consultants]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Soulbound]]
